description: Canonical PR #23 Final Attestation. Binds evidence_subject_head (a stable, already-known commit) — does NOT reference its own future commit SHA. CI generates a complementary attestation artifact with GITHUB_SHA + run ID. This receipt file is immutable once committed; future commits do not invalidate it.
evidence_subject_description: Commit containing all PR #23 remediation fixes (brand, drift, runtime-truth, provenance). This is the commit BEING VERIFIED — it already exists and will not change.

local_test_baseline.root_cause: api.py hardcodes ui_root relative to __file__. In production, ui/out/index.html exists and /console mounts correctly. Test creates temp directory without ui/out, but the hardcoded path resolves to the real project ui/out/ which exists. Test-isolation defect, not a product bug.

external_blockers: macOS code signing certificate (Apple Developer Program)
attested_by: Claude Code — PR #23 Final Provenance Remediation
